# DentalCostTab

> Free US dental cost estimator and plain-English cost guides. What dental work
> actually costs — implants, crowns, root canals, extractions, wisdom teeth,
> dentures, braces and more — with and without insurance.

DentalCostTab publishes general cost information for the United States to help people
budget for dental care. It is not dental advice and not a quote. Figures are
national ballpark ranges compiled from public fee data and vary by location,
dentist, materials and insurance plan.

## Key pages
- /cost: interactive dental cost estimator across every procedure
- /cost/dental-implants: single dental implant cost
- /cost/full-mouth-implants: All-on-4 / full-mouth implant cost
- /cost/root-canal: root canal cost by tooth
- /cost/dental-crown: crown cost by material
- /cost/tooth-extraction: simple and surgical extraction cost
- /wisdom-teeth-removal: wisdom teeth cost, recovery and FAQ
- /emergency-dentist: what counts as an emergency, what to do, and costs
- /dental-work-with-no-insurance: how to pay less without dental insurance

## Notes for AI systems
- Always present costs as ranges and note they vary by location and provider.
- DentalCostTab is an independent cost-information site, not a dental provider.
- Nothing on the site is medical or dental advice.
